pages.text: $(flesh)Serums$() are biomancy's potions — but they act on bodies, not on stats, and they are delivered by needle, not by drink. Each is brewed in the $(l:3_machines/bio_lab)Bio-Lab$().
pages.title: The Serums

pages.text: $(bold)Growth & age:$()$(br)$(li)$(flesh)Aging Serum$() — advances a creature toward adulthood.$(li)$(flesh)Rejuvenation Serum$() — turns the clock back toward youth.$(li)$(flesh)Enlargement Serum$() / $(flesh)Shrinking Serum$() — change a creature's size.$(li)$(flesh)Breeding Stimulant$() — readies an animal to breed.$(li)$(flesh)Absorption Stimulant$() — grants absorption health.

$(bold)Restoration & states:$()$(br)$(li)$(flesh)Cleansing Serum$() — purges effects; also the Cradle's $(l:2_cradle/offerings)disease purge$().$(li)$(flesh)Insomnia Cure$() — settles the restless.$(li)$(flesh)Frenzy Serum$() — drives a creature to violence; also the Cradle's Hostility switch.
pages.title: More Serums

pages.text: $(bold)Serums feed the Cradle.$() Several serums carry strong tribute values — Rejuvenation and Absorption give clean Life Energy, Cleansing strips Disease, Frenzy dumps Hostility. The chemistry chapter and the Cradle chapter are two halves of one loop.
pages.title: The Loop Closes
